ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Lloyd W. Schloegel, Plaintiff. Matter dismissed by Court. JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To Mar-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Lloyd W. Schloegel, Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAR-18-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Plaintiff Lloyd Schloegel'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lloyd Schloegel, self-represented litigant, appeared.
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

The matter is called. The Court informs Mr. Schloegel that he does not have the appropriate documents for the Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment. She instructs him consult legal assistance. The following documents are needed: separate statement, evidence, and proof of service to all parties. The Court orders Mr. Schloegel to revise his paperwork and obtain a new hearing date. The Court takes the matter off calendar.

Visiting Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk Rosallie Gumpal, Not Reported. (611)

Plaintiff Lloyd Schloegel'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Continued To Dec-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lloyd Schloegel, self-represented litigant, appeared.
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

Matter called. The Court informs Mr. Schloegel that his moving papers are deficient, that there should be compliance with with CCP 437(c), and that the moving papers lack a separate statement and evidence. In addition, the Court advised Mr. Schloegel to seek legal assistance and continued plaintiff Lloyd Schloegel's Motion for Summary Judgment to Wednesday, December 18, 2018 at 9:00 am in Department 611. Mr. Schloegel referenced case no. CGC-00-314530. Judge O'Malley Taylor stated that she would review case no. CGC-00-314530 prior to the next court date. File ordered from archives this date. Visiting Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. D-611

Defendant Jp Mortgan Chase Bank, N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Pro Per pltf; Wendy Krog, Esq. for defts. Demurrer heard; sustained with prejudice; order signed in open court; Judge: Robert Foley; Clerk; Rani Edwards; Reporter: not present ( waived)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JP MORTGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Judge Miller is recused from hearing this matter. Per the Presiding Judge, the demurrer will be heard by Judge Robert Foley on Wednesday, June 19, 2013 at 9 am. The hearing will be held at the Hall of Justice, 850 Bryant Street, Department 28, San Francisco, California, and not the Civic Center Courthouse. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To Jun-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 18, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 on the Court's own motion. Judge Kramer recuses himself under CCP 170.1. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
